title: rosa viscaria var. robusta
intro: Rosa viscaria var. robusta, also known as the Alpenrose or Alpine Rose, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Rosa viscaria var. robusta is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in natural remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
